Prime Video India Presents
Maa Ka Sum Official Trailer
Starring Mona Singh, Mihir Ahuja, Angira Dhar, Ranveer Brar, Rohan Joshi, Celesti Bairagey, Hetal Gada, Ishankk Salluja, Yuktam Khosla, Gunjan Joshi, Ismeet Kohli, Namit, Nikhat Khan Hegde, Adil Zubair, Pubali Sanyal, Puja Banerjee, Manish Anand

About:
Agastya, a math wizard who sees this world in graphs, numbers, charts, algorithms, meets his idol one day, and with her tries to solve his mother’s problem of dating. In the journey to find the perfect match for his mother with the help of Math and his algorithms, he not only finds love for his mother but also discovers love lost and found for himself.

Instagram: @primevideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

description:
Calling All Villains is a 3D animated sci-fi/action/comedy series produced and creatively helmed by ZAMination, starring Mr. Puzzles--originally from SMG4.

This isn’t a direct continuation of SMG4. Set years later, the series follows Mr. Puzzles as he’s evolved--for better or worse... roping him into all-new adventures with a brand new cast of characters. Haven't seen SMG4? No problem! Calling All Villains is built as a fresh starting point, so you can jump right in and enjoy the ride. And for longtime fans, there are plenty of hidden nods and juicy Easter eggs waiting for you... 

With full blessing from SMG4, we've been given the rights to continue Mr. Puzzles’ story and bring this series to life. The pilot episode is currently in production, with the full release planned for later this year. More updates are coming soon, so remember...

title: The End of Oak Street | Official Teaser Trailer
tags: 2026|Anne Hathaway|August 2026|Bad Robot|Christian Convery|Coming Soon|David Robert Mitchell|End Of Oak Street|Ewan McGregor|J.J. Abrams|Maisy Stella|Oak Street|Sci Fi|Warner Bros
description:
“Our house, our neighborhood, our whole street has moved." The End of Oak Street only in theaters and IMAX August 14. #EndofOakStreet #FilmedforIMAX

After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

Starring Anne Hathaway and Ewan McGregor, THE END OF OAK STREET also stars Maisy Stella and Christian Convery. The film is written and directed by David Robert Mitchell and produced by J.J. Abrams, Hannah Minghella, Jon Cohen, David Robert Mitchell, Matt Jackson and Tommy Harper. The executive producers are Chris Bender, Jake Weiner, Joanne Lee and Leeann Stonebreaker.

Mitchell’s team behind the camera includes director of photography Michael Gioulakis, production designer Maya Shimoguchi, editor John Axelrad, composer Michael Giacchino and costume designer Erin Benach. 
Warner Bros. Pictures Presents A Bad Robot Production, A Jackson Pictures Production, A David Robert Mitchell Film: THE END OF OAK STREET. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX in North America on August 14, 2026, and internationally beginning 12 August 2026.

"The One That Got Away" de Katy Perry es una historia nostálgica sobre ese amor que marcó tu vida pero que, por decisiones o circunstancias, se perdió para siempre. La canción mezcla recuerdos juveniles con arrepentimiento, mostrando cómo incluso con éxito y dinero, hay cosas —como el tiempo y las personas— que no se pueden recuperar.

description:
大人気漫画の「銀魂」の空知英秋のデビュー作を原作とした、Netflixシリーズ「だんでらいおん」が4月16日（木）より世界独占配信！

現世に未練を残し成仏することができずにいる霊魂を捜索・発見し、冥界に送ることを使命とする日本天使連盟送迎部。天使たちは超多忙な日々に追われていた。本組織に所属する丹波鉄男と班長・黒鉄美咲からなる第21班たんぽぽ組は、霊魂一体一体とマイペースに向き合い、彼らの未練を解消することで成仏へと導いていた。そんなある日、全力疾走で逃げ回る年老いた男性の地縛霊と出会う。

description:
TVアニメ『アオのハコ』Season2

◇イントロダクション◇
青さが胸を衝く、青春部活ラブストーリー

「週刊少年ジャンプ」（集英社）にて好評連載中の三浦糀による大人気マンガ『アオのハコ』。
等身大のキャラクター達がそれぞれの想いを胸に部活に打ち込むひたむきな姿と、“誰かを好きになった時”の心の機微を繊細に描いた本作は、2021年4月の連載開始から多くの読者を魅了している。

◆STORY◆
毎朝一番に会いたい人がいる――
中高一貫のスポーツ強豪校・栄明高校男子バドミントン部の猪股大喜は、
毎日、朝練で顔を合わせる女子バスケットボール部のエースで一つ上の先輩、鹿野千夏に恋をする。
ある日、千夏が親の海外転勤に伴い、猪股家に居候することになり、二人の距離は朝練仲間から一変。
部活に恋に勉強に、大喜にとって忘れられない、新しい季節がはじまる――

title: FLOW - COLORS / THE FIRST TAKE
tags: the first take|firsttake|ファーストテイク|ふぁーすとていく|一発撮り|TFT|音楽|音楽番組|FLOW|COLORS|コードギアス_反逆のルルーシュ
description:
「THE FIRST TAKE」は、一発撮りのパフォーマンスを鮮明に切り取るYouTubeチャンネル。

第652回は、ツインボーカルが織り成すメロディの強さと幅広い音楽性を持つ5人組ロックバンド FLOWが3年ぶりに登場。
アニメ『コードギアス 反逆のルルーシュ』主人公"ルルーシュ・ランペルージ"からのメッセージを受け取ったFLOWによる、主題歌「COLORS」の力強いパフォーマンス。
今年20周年を迎える作品をFLOWの熱量溢れる歌唱で彩ったスペシャルな一発撮り披露。

STREAMING & DOWNLOAD：https://flow.lnk.to/COLORS


■FLOW OFFICIAL
Web Site: https://www.flow-official.jp/
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCLakaKEelmUdqQISLjwIRmg
X: https://x.com/FLOW_official
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/FLOW_OFFICIAL_JAPAN/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/FLOWofficial.music
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@flow_official_japan

■「THE FIRST TAKE」OFFICIAL  
Web Site: https://www.thefirsttake.jp/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/the_firsttake/
X: https://twitter.com/The_FirstTake
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@the_first_take
THE FIRST TIMES: https://www.thefirsttimes.jp/

■RULES
白いスタジオに置かれた一本のマイク。 
ここでのルールはただ一つ。
一発撮りのパフォーマンスをすること。 

A microphone and a white studio.
And 1 rule.
You’ve got 1 TAKE.

■STATEMENT
一発撮りで切りとる。
今という時間と、
今しか出せない音を。

THE FIRST TAKE
この瞬間は、二度とない。

CAPTURE THE TAKE.
THIS MOMENT.
THIS SOUND.

THE FIRST TAKE
IT ONLY HAPPENS ONCE.


Episode 652 features FLOW, the five-piece rock band known for their melodic and eclectic musical style, driven by dual lead vocals, returning three years after their last appearance.
Inspired by  the message they received from Lelouch Lamperouge the lead character from the anime, Code Geass: Lelouch of the Rebellion, the band gives a fiery performance of  “COLORS,” the anime’s theme song.
Enjoy this special one-shot performance, highlighted by FLOW’s passionate vocals, celebrating the series’s 20th anniversary this year.

https://discord.gg/yNUS9W6a8K

▼ドズル社×LEVEL∞ コラボPC
https://www.pc-koubou.jp/pc/game_dozle.php

▼みんなへ

ども！ドズルです！

概要欄からこんにちは！
こんなところまでチェックしてくれて、ありがとうございます。

ドズル社のことをもっと知りたい！！！って概要欄をひらいてくれたのかな？
そんなあなたに、伝えたいメッセージを書きます！

ドズル社はみんなの「人生というゲームをもっと楽しく」することを目的に活動しています。
僕たちのコンテンツを通じて、たくさん笑顔になってくれると嬉しいです。
みんなのゲームに登場する愉快なキャラクターになれていますか？


応援の方法もたくさんあります。
動画を見る、コメントする、グッズを買う、イベントに参加する、
ドズル社を話題にする、おすすめする、イラストを描く、切り抜きをする。

そのすべてが僕たちのパワーになって、みんなのおかげで楽しく活動できています！
本当にいつもありがとう！！！


ただ、一つだけ約束してください。
応援しすぎて、疲れないように！！！
みんなに楽しんでもらうために活動しているので、応援しすぎて疲れちゃうのは本末転倒です。

自分のペースで、ゆるーくながーく応援してくださいね。
それが一番うれしいです。

今日、動画を見てくれた人が、
明日も、来週も、来年も、10年後も見たくなるような動画を作りつづけたい！

全部の動画を見なくてもいいです。
たまに動画を見てくれるだけでも、本当に嬉しいです。
好きな時に、ふらっと動画を見にきてください。


ドズル社は新しいチャレンジをして、アップデートします。
将来どんなことができるか、ワクワクです。
一緒にドズル社の変化を楽しみながら、人生というゲームを楽しみましょう！


ドズルより

マスターリーグを中心に、予選から決勝までの様子を、会場の「インテックス大阪」特設スタジオから生放送でお届けいたします。

実況・解説・インタビュアー：ライチュ梅川、ななっぷる、クチート竹内、よぴふっと

・出演予定者は予告なく変更になる場合がございます。
・当日の諸事情により放送時間が変更になる可能性があります。このため放送開始が遅れる場合、予定時間より放送が早く終了する場合、あるいは配信準備の都合上途中からの放送となる場合もございます。あらかじめご了承ください。
・インターネット回線状況により、放送が一時中断もしくは中止となる場合がございます。

title: む (裏) / 重音テト・足立レイ
description:
オンリー集合イベント「そうぞうパレッツ 手とテ重ねテ２段目」にてOda Koganeさん頒布予定の「む 同人誌」制作に伴い、記念に裏verを制作しました

イベント詳細はこちら↓
https://tokyo.souzou-palettes.net/2026/join/ttt2/


・VOCALS 重音テト・足立レイ

・MUSIC 大漠波新
https://x.com/Daibakuhasin

・ILLUSTRATION Oda Kogane
https://x.com/oda_koden

・調声 yasai31
https://x.com/yasai31_

・offvocal  BPM151
https://piapro.jp/t/2m2u

君と見ていた景色は
「だjァご羅e異バ薇ｸ利」
イカれたその記憶を目にし、
飾る故意はメディシン
息が詰まるような縁
魔反対で荒削り
形を比べたならあっちゅう間
実際のところそれ何分間？

- アアアアア　-
君の心手に取るように
判る、けど換わるわテクノロジー
乾いく着飾るドレスのように
誰かの言葉がこちらを呼ぶ

言語(げんご)
言語(ごんご)
「今度…」
ﾄﾞﾓ
戻らない永遠

どうにもなりたくないのに
羽が生えてる
左がいないのに
枯れたお花にもする水やり
水差すなよ
本当はやりたくないのに
もがき苦しみ演じるアイドリング
それでも言う
うちらもうバラバラか？？？

救われる方法ひとつじゃないのに？
無駄に生きている君のアイコニック
戻りたけりゃ戻れる
その覚悟があるなら
「全部投げ捨てても求めたいのに」
「全部が拾えてもやらないのに」
なんか…
これって
それって
無駄な会話

「」

description:
Calling All Villains is a 3D animated sci-fi/action/comedy series produced and creatively helmed by ZAMination, starring Mr. Puzzles--originally from SMG4.

This isn’t a direct continuation of SMG4. Set years later, the series follows Mr. Puzzles as he’s evolved--for better or worse... roping him into all-new adventures with a brand new cast of characters. Haven't seen SMG4? No problem! Calling All Villains is built as a fresh starting point, so you can jump right in and enjoy the ride. And for longtime fans, there are plenty of hidden nods and juicy Easter eggs waiting for you... 

With full blessing from SMG4, we've been given the rights to continue Mr. Puzzles’ story and bring this series to life. The pilot episode is currently in production, with the full release planned for later this year. More updates are coming soon, so remember...

title: FATAL FURY: CotW × FIST OF THE NORTH STAR: HOKUTO NO KEN｜KENSHIRO｜Teaser Trailer
tags: FATAL FURY|GAROU|餓狼伝説|餓狼|City of the Wolves|CotW|格闘ゲーム|Fighting Game|ケンシロウ|北斗の拳|北斗の拳 -FIST OF THE NORTH STAR-|アニメ|Anime|漫画|FIST OF THE NORTH STAR: HOKUTO NO KEN
description:
From North Star to South Town―
Kenshiro is coming to FATAL FURY: City of the Wolves!
Fists meet Fury in June 2026. 👊⚡

--------------------------------------------------------------

Kenshiro from Fist of the North Star explodes into City of the Wolves Season 2!

The legendary fighter who survived the end of the century descends on South Town in FATAL FURY: City of the Wolves. How will Kenshiro, with his commanding presence, blend in with the game's mechanics and mayhem? Stay tuned for more developments!

What is Fist of the North Star?
Fist of the North Star (Hokuto no Ken) is a Japanese manga franchise created by Buronson and illustrated by Tetsuo Hara. It centers on Kenshiro, sole successor to the ancient Hokuto Shinken martial art, and his fight against evil in a post-apocalyptic world ravaged by nuclear war. Fist of the North Star was serialized in Weekly Shonen Jump magazine in 1983 and has enthralled fans worldwide ever since with its profound universe, unforgettable characterization, and memorable lines.

A brand-new anime iteration—FIST OF THE NORTH STAR—will air on TOKYO MX and BS11 from April 10, 2026 (1 AM JST), with new staff, cast members, and the latest video technologies ushering the franchise into the modern era. Tune in as fearsome warriors battle it out at the end of the century and forge a fresh new legend this year!

--------------------------------------------------------------

Legends unleashed! The Legend Edition bundles the base game with Season Passes 1 and 2—a perfect way to enjoy the franchise's appeal for newcomers and veterans alike!

title: ESCAPAMOS de Nuestros PADRES MALOS en Minecraft!
description:
ESCAPAMOS de Nuestros PADRES MALOS en Minecraft!

MI LIBRO JARDRED CONTRA LA REINA DE FUEGO 👇🔥🎃
https://www.planetadelibros.com/libro-jardred-contra-la-reina-de-fuego/378145

▶TWITTER:  
https://twitter.com/SoyJardred
▶INSTAGRAM:  
https://www.instagram.com/jardred

ADVERTENCIA! - Que encontraras en Jardred?

En Jardred encontrarás vídeos de Minecraft cuidadosamente preparados y guionizados, creados con el único propósito de ofrecer historias entretenidas para el público. El contenido está dirigido a toda la familia: aunque los personajes son caóticos y las situaciones pueden ser intensas, nunca se transmiten mensajes negativos a la audiencia. Todo está pensado para entretener tanto a los más pequeños como a los más mayores.

El canal se inspira en múltiples creadores de la plataforma de YouTube, pero siempre con un enfoque propio y original, buscando que cada historia tenga una identidad única que no pueda encontrarse en ningún otro canal. Publicamos contenido diario de Minecraft en formato largo y Shorts, pensado para todo tipo de público.

PERSONAJES:

JARDRED
Una calabaza viviente caótica, con cambios de humor constantes. Al mínimo enfado recurre a la dinamita para hacerlo volar todo por los aires, aunque intenta controlar sus impulsos. Adora a los gatos y, aunque no lo admita, es muy miedoso con todo lo relacionado con el terror. Aprecia profundamente a sus amigos, aunque rara vez lo demuestra, prefiriendo expresar su cariño a través de bromas extremas y situaciones absurdas.

MAURICIO
El aldeano principal y más conocido de la aldea. Es el acompañante habitual de Jardred en casi todas sus aventuras, aunque a menudo termina agotado por su comportamiento y necesita tiempo a solas. Le apasionan los negocios y ganar dinero; su pasatiempo favorito es jugar en el ordenador. Trabaja diariamente organizando y distribuyendo las tareas entre los aldeanos del reino.

PABLO
El único aldeano que viste una túnica blanca. Es un científico apasionado por la naturaleza y los animales, siempre experimentando, aunque muchas veces sus pruebas acaban en situaciones inesperadas. A pesar de su pasado tímido, ahora no tolera que nadie se burle de él y siempre está dispuesto a ayudar a sus amigos cuando se encuentran en problemas.

ALMUDENA
La única aldeana que viste una túnica rosa. Es la líder de los ejércitos de la aldea, aunque actualmente dispone de más tiempo libre desde que el Rey Aldeano ha comenzado a sustituir el ejército tradicional por agentes de policía bajo su mando. Tiene un carácter fuerte y autoritario, y no soporta que le lleven la contraria cuando sabe que tiene razón.

JARD
El clon malvado de Jardred. En el pasado fue la criatura más poderosa de Minecraft, capaz de corromper y controlar mundos y criaturas a su antojo. Actualmente vive en la aldea con solo una pequeña parte de sus antiguos poderes, intentando llevar una vida normal. En esta nueva etapa, se encuentra estudiando programación.

title: FORGOTTEN ISLAND | Official Trailer
description:
Forgotten Island - In Theaters September 25

Your best friendship is worth fighting for.

DreamWorks Animation, the studio that brought you unforgettable bonds between a boy and a dragon in How to Train Your Dragon, an ogre and a donkey in Shrek, and a robot and a gosling in The Wild Robot, now welcomes a dazzling and emotional story about two lifelong best friends who must come together before they drift apart in Forgotten Island. 

The new original film is written and directed by Academy Award® nominee Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado and is produced by Academy Award® nominee Mark Swift, the filmmaking team behind Puss in Boots: The Last Wish. 

Grammy and Academy Award® winning supernova H.E.R. and Liza Soberano (Lisa Frankenstein, Alone/Together) star as high school graduates Jo and Raissa, who have been best friends since grade school but are now about to embark on separate life paths. 

While celebrating their last night together, Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali, packed with magical and mythological creatures they grew up hearing stories about from their Filipino families.  
Some of these figures will become friends, some foes. Joined by well-meaning-but- hapless weredog Raww (Dave Franco) and a small-but-mighty pack of pals, Jo and Raissa must face The Dreaded Manananggal (Tony winning icon Lea Salonga), the most feared creature on the island. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever. 
The film’s all-star voice cast also includes Emmy nominee Jenny Slate (Marcel the Shell with Shoes On, Dying for Sex), Manny Jacinto (The Good Place, Top Gun: Maverick), BAFTA nominee Dolly de Leon (Triangle of Sadness, Ghostlight), global comedy superstar Jo Koy (Haunted Mansion, Jo Koy: Live from Brooklyn) and Emmy winner Ronny Chieng (The Daily Show, M3GAN).  

DreamWorks Animation’s Forgotten Island is distributed by Universal Pictures.

title: Moana | "Official Trailer" | In Theaters July 10
description:
The ocean chose her for a reason. 🌊
Experience Disney's #Moana, only in theaters July 10.

In “Moana,” Disney’s live action reimagining of the beloved Oscar®-nominated animated adventure, Moana (Catherine Lagaʻaia) answers the Ocean’s call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui (Dwayne Johnson) on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people. The film is directed by Emmy® and Tony Award® winner Thomas Kail (“Hamilton”); produced by Dwayne Johnson, Dany Garcia, Beau Flynn, Hiram Garcia and Lin-Manuel Miranda; and executive produced by Kail, Scott Sheldon, Charles Newirth and Auliʻi Cravalho, who voiced Moana in the animated films “Moana” and “Moana 2.” “Moana” features original songs by Lin-Manuel Miranda, Opetaia Foaʻi and Mark Mancina, and an original score composed by Mancina. Audiences can experience the brilliant cinematic sights, sounds and songs of “Moana” exclusively in theaters on July 10, 2026.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

title: The End of Oak Street | Official Teaser Trailer
tags: 2026|Anne Hathaway|August 2026|Bad Robot|Christian Convery|Coming Soon|David Robert Mitchell|End Of Oak Street|Ewan McGregor|J.J. Abrams|Maisy Stella|Oak Street|Sci Fi|Warner Bros
description:
“Our house, our neighborhood, our whole street has moved." The End of Oak Street only in theaters and IMAX August 14. #EndofOakStreet #FilmedforIMAX

After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

Starring Anne Hathaway and Ewan McGregor, THE END OF OAK STREET also stars Maisy Stella and Christian Convery. The film is written and directed by David Robert Mitchell and produced by J.J. Abrams, Hannah Minghella, Jon Cohen, David Robert Mitchell, Matt Jackson and Tommy Harper. The executive producers are Chris Bender, Jake Weiner, Joanne Lee and Leeann Stonebreaker.

Mitchell’s team behind the camera includes director of photography Michael Gioulakis, production designer Maya Shimoguchi, editor John Axelrad, composer Michael Giacchino and costume designer Erin Benach. 
Warner Bros. Pictures Presents A Bad Robot Production, A Jackson Pictures Production, A David Robert Mitchell Film: THE END OF OAK STREET. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX in North America on August 14, 2026, and internationally beginning 12 August 2026.

🔹 PUBG Champions League (Trung Quốc): 🇨🇳 Change The Game, 🇨🇳 JD Gaming
🔹 PUBG EMEA Championship (EMEA): 🇹🇷 S2G Esports, Team Vitality
🔹 PUBG Weekly Series (Hàn Quốc): 🇰🇷 Crazy Raccoon, 🇰🇷 T1
🔹 PUBG Thailand Series (Thái Lan): 🇹🇭 Made in Thailand, 🇹🇭 Theerathon Five

🔥 Xem chi tiết thể thức thi đấu PUBG Global Series 1 tại đây: https://pubgesports.com/vi/news/9803
━━━━━━━━━━

🏆 THỂ THỨC PUBG GLOBAL SERIES 2 (PGS 2)

⭐ Nhánh Thắng (17h 26/03): 16 đội đứng đầu PGS 1 thi đấu 5 trận.
🔹 8 đội đứng đầu → Tiến thẳng vào Vòng Chung Kết (8 đội này sẽ Nhận Điểm Lợi Thế ở Vòng Chung Kết)
🔹 8 đội xếp cuối → Rơi xuống Vòng Sinh Tồn

⭐ Vòng Sinh Tồn (17h 27/03): 16 đội (8 đội xếp cuối PGS 1 + 8 đội xếp cuối Nhánh Thắng) thi đấu 5 trận.
🔹 8 đội đứng đầu → Lọt vào Vòng Chung Kết
🔹 8 đội xếp cuối → Bị loại

⭐ Vòng Chung Kết (17h 28/03 – 29/03): 16 đội thi đấu 10 trận để xác định BXH chung cuộc PGS 2 - Series 2.

✅ Điểm Lợi Thế là gì?
🔹  8 đội đứng đầu tại Nhánh Thắng (những đội giành quyền vào thẳng Vòng Chung Kết) sẽ nhận số Điểm Lợi Thế sau đây. Số điểm này sẽ được cộng trực tiếp vào bảng xếp hạng tại Chung Kết như sau: #1: 10 điểm - #2: 6 điểm - #3: 5 điểm - #4: 4 điểm - #5: 3 điểm - #6: 2 điểm - #7: 1 điểm - #8: 1 điểm.

description:
RU NỬA VẦNG TRĂNG - GIỌNG CA DỊU DÀNG NGHE RẤT CUỐN ► Trúc Linh Bolero (Official MV 4K) 
💃 Thưởng thức liên khúc Rumba Bolero sến xưa ngọt ngào và sâu lắng, với giọng ca truyền cảm của ca sĩ Trúc Linh - người mang đến phong cách hát nhẹ nhàng, da diết và đậm chất hoài niệm.
Cùng với hình ảnh người mẫu xinh đẹp, đầy đặn và giai điệu bolero bất hủ, video sẽ đưa bạn trở về không gian âm nhạc mộc mạc, gần gũi của những năm tháng yêu thương xưa cũ.

🌹 Trúc Linh Bolero hân hạnh giới thiệu đến quý khán giả những liên khúc nhạc vàng, bolero, rumba trữ tình chọn lọc, nơi giọng hát Trúc Linh hòa cùng âm thanh mộc mạc, tạo nên những phút giây thư giãn và lắng đọng tâm hồn.

👉 Dành tặng cho những ai yêu thích nhạc sến xưa, bolero trữ tình, rumba quê hương, và đặc biệt là những khán giả luôn dõi theo giọng hát Trúc Linh Bolero - người giữ lửa cho dòng nhạc xưa đầy cảm xúc.

🔔 ĐĂNG KÝ & BẬT CHUÔNG để không bỏ lỡ những liên khúc bolero sến xưa chọn lọc mỗi ngày.

description:
⚔️ Ngày thi đấu 27/03 tâm điểm hứa hẹn sẽ là những cặp đấu được đánh giá cân tài cân sức. Cả LGC, FPL, FL và TKO đều đã thể hiện phong độ rất thuyết phục tại Swiss Stage, cho thấy sự ổn định và khả năng cạnh tranh sòng phẳng. Khi bước vào vòng Knock-Out, nơi mọi sai lầm đều phải trả giá, bản lĩnh thi đấu và khả năng tận dụng cơ hội sẽ trở thành yếu tố then chốt quyết định tấm vé đi tiếp.

🔥 Ở phía còn lại, hai ông lớn NK và SGLX - những đội tuyển đã thể hiện phong độ áp đảo từ Swiss Stage. Trước các đối thủ lần lượt là AEJ và TNE, thử thách đặt ra không chỉ là chiến thắng mà còn là việc tiếp tục duy trì sức mạnh của những ứng viên vô địch. 

⏰ Liệu đội tuyển nào sẽ có được lợi thế tại vòng Knock-Out bằng những chiến thắng đầu tay, tất cả sẽ được giải đáp vào 14:00 | 27/03 trên các kênh sóng chính thức của FC Online Việt Nam

📅 Lịch thi đấu Knock-Out Stage ngày 27/03:
14:00 - Star Galaxy vs Tân Nhiên Esport (BO5) 
15:30 - Legacy Esports vs FPT Polytechnic (BO5)
17:00 - NK FC Online vs Anh Em Japan (BO5)
18:30 - Team Flash vs TAKIO (BO5)

👉 Giftcode vô cùng hấp dẫn sẽ xuất hiện xuyên suốt livestream. Đừng bỏ lỡ nhé!

#FVPLSpring2026 #KickOffYourF4NTASY #KnockOutStage
--------------------------------------------------
EA Sports FC Online là trò chơi bóng đá trực tuyến miễn phí trên máy tính, được phát triển bởi EA Sports và phát hành bởi Garena tại Việt Nam. Trong game, bạn là một nhà quản lý, huấn luyện viên xây dựng và phát triển đội bóng theo ý thích của riêng bạn. Trong trận đấu, bạn là người điều khiển tất cả cầu thủ trên sân và trải nghiệm trận đấu bóng đá chân thực nhất. 
🔹 Trang chủ và tải game tại: https://fconline.garena.vn/
🌟 Kênh Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EASportsFCOnlineVN
🎁 Nạp thẻ: https://napthe.vn
🍻 Group cộng đồng: https://www.facebook.com/groups/easportsfconlinevn
🎮 Hướng dẫn và quà tân thủ: https://hocvien.fconline.garena.vn/

Đây là trò chơi duy nhất tại Việt Nam có bản quyền của 30 giải đấu hàng đầu thế giới như Premier League, La Liga, Bundesliga…,hơn 700 Câu Lạc Bộ, hơn 19,000 cầu thủ, hơn 100 sân vận động, tất cả nằm trong series game bóng đá đã khẳng định danh tiếng trên toàn thế giới trong nhiều năm qua. Trò chơi được phát triển bởi hãng EA Sports, người “cha đẻ” của loạt game thể thao nổi tiếng khác như NBA Live,FC ,Tiger Wood PGA Tour...

EA Sports FC Online Vietnam là kênh youtube chính thức của FC Online Việt Nam, đồng thời là đơn vị duy nhất giữ bản quyền sản xuất toàn bộ nội dung game và giải đấu FC Online tại Việt Nam và do Garena chịu trách nhiệm

description:
২০২৬ সালে প্রচারিত ঈদের বিশেষ ইত্যাদির দুর্দান্ত সব আয়োজনের একটি ছিলো দুই ভুবনের দুই জনপ্রিয় তারকার একসঙ্গে গান। চলচ্চিত্র তারকা শবনম বুবলী এবং বর্তমান সময়ের জনপ্রিয় সংগীত শিল্পী ইমরান মাহমুদুল। পেশাদার সংগীতশিল্পী না হয়েও পেশাদার শিল্পী ইমরানের সঙ্গে খুব চমৎকারভাবে গানটি গেয়েছেন বুবলী। অভিনয়ে জনপ্রিয় বুবলীর টিভিতে গাওয়া এটিই প্রথম গান। বলা যায় এই গানটির মাধ্যমেই বুবলীর গায়িকা হিসেবে আত্মপ্রকাশ। অর্থাৎ ইত্যাদির মাধ্যমে নায়িকা বুবলী গায়িকা হলেন।

Performed live by Sami Yusuf and Atif Aslam at the Etihad Arena in Abu Dhabi in November 2025, ‘Mast Qalandar’ is a celebrated qawwali of the Indian subcontinent, deeply rooted in centuries of Sufi tradition. The piece is based on a devotional poem attributed to the renowned Sufi poet and musical pioneer Amir Khusro, later expanded and enriched by the verses of the great Punjabi mystic Bulleh Shah. Its lyrics express reverence (not worship) for Ali ibn Abi Talib—who holds central importance in Sufi spiritual lineage—and pay tribute to the revered 12th-century saint Lal Shahbaz Qalandar of Sindh.

Equally central to ‘Mast Qalandar’ is its powerful musical structure. Built on the traditional qawwali form, the piece unfolds through dynamic call-and-response passages, rhythmic handclaps, and a gradual intensification of tempo and energy. Driven by harmonium, sitar, percussion, and layered vocals, the music creates a state of spiritual elevation, where repetition and improvisation draw both performers and listeners into a shared experience of ecstasy. This intricate interplay between melody, rhythm, and vocal expression is what gives the qawwali its enduring emotional and spiritual impact.

Widely popularized in the modern era by Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan, ‘Mast Qalandar’ has become one of the most iconic expressions of Sufi musical tradition, embodying themes of spiritual love and transcendence.

Performed brilliantly here by two contemporary musical icons.

description:
The ocean chose her for a reason. 🌊
Experience Disney's #Moana, only in theaters July 10.

In “Moana,” Disney’s live action reimagining of the beloved Oscar®-nominated animated adventure, Moana (Catherine Lagaʻaia) answers the Ocean’s call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui (Dwayne Johnson) on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people. The film is directed by Emmy® and Tony Award® winner Thomas Kail (“Hamilton”); produced by Dwayne Johnson, Dany Garcia, Beau Flynn, Hiram Garcia and Lin-Manuel Miranda; and executive produced by Kail, Scott Sheldon, Charles Newirth and Auliʻi Cravalho, who voiced Moana in the animated films “Moana” and “Moana 2.” “Moana” features original songs by Lin-Manuel Miranda, Opetaia Foaʻi and Mark Mancina, and an original score composed by Mancina. Audiences can experience the brilliant cinematic sights, sounds and songs of “Moana” exclusively in theaters on July 10, 2026.

title: FATAL FURY: CotW × FIST OF THE NORTH STAR: HOKUTO NO KEN｜KENSHIRO｜Teaser Trailer
tags: FATAL FURY|GAROU|餓狼伝説|餓狼|City of the Wolves|CotW|格闘ゲーム|Fighting Game|ケンシロウ|北斗の拳|北斗の拳 -FIST OF THE NORTH STAR-|アニメ|Anime|漫画|FIST OF THE NORTH STAR: HOKUTO NO KEN
description:
From North Star to South Town―
Kenshiro is coming to FATAL FURY: City of the Wolves!
Fists meet Fury in June 2026. 👊⚡

--------------------------------------------------------------

Kenshiro from Fist of the North Star explodes into City of the Wolves Season 2!

The legendary fighter who survived the end of the century descends on South Town in FATAL FURY: City of the Wolves. How will Kenshiro, with his commanding presence, blend in with the game's mechanics and mayhem? Stay tuned for more developments!

What is Fist of the North Star?
Fist of the North Star (Hokuto no Ken) is a Japanese manga franchise created by Buronson and illustrated by Tetsuo Hara. It centers on Kenshiro, sole successor to the ancient Hokuto Shinken martial art, and his fight against evil in a post-apocalyptic world ravaged by nuclear war. Fist of the North Star was serialized in Weekly Shonen Jump magazine in 1983 and has enthralled fans worldwide ever since with its profound universe, unforgettable characterization, and memorable lines.

A brand-new anime iteration—FIST OF THE NORTH STAR—will air on TOKYO MX and BS11 from April 10, 2026 (1 AM JST), with new staff, cast members, and the latest video technologies ushering the franchise into the modern era. Tune in as fearsome warriors battle it out at the end of the century and forge a fresh new legend this year!

--------------------------------------------------------------

Legends unleashed! The Legend Edition bundles the base game with Season Passes 1 and 2—a perfect way to enjoy the franchise's appeal for newcomers and veterans alike!

title: Eterno João Carreiro (Clipe Oficial)
tags: Som Livre (Record Label)|Slap Música|Sertanejo|Tá Rodada
description:
#EternoJoaoCarreiro #JoaoCarreiro #sertanejo 

Clipe oficial em homenagem ao Eterno João Carreiro de Loubet, Breno Reis & Marco Viola, Victor & Matheus, João Lucas & Walter Filho, Us Agroboy, Jads & Jadson.


ETERNO JOÃO CARREIRO

LETRA:

No dia 03 de janeiro, uma estrela brilhou
Iluminou o planeta e partiu com nosso senhor
Deixando muita tristeza para quem o acompanhou
Mas também muita alegria na viola ele fazia poesia com amor
Em 1982, 24 de novembro, nascia em Cuiabá um menino de talento
De presente do vovô ganhou seu primeiro instrumento
Uma viola caipira, ali seu som inicia, com o dom Deus o abençoou

Sua história é cumprida, eu vou tentar resumir
Gravou seu primeiro disco só com os modão raiz
Foi tão grande seu sucesso que precisou deixar Cuiabá
A capital do MS, cidade de campo grande o menino foi morar

Dali só foi para frente, seu sucesso aumentou
Com nova sonoridade o sertanejo ele mudou
Muito fã de Tião Carreiro, sua viola sempre levou
Com a moda bruto rústico, um pagodão de viola
Foi que ele se consagrou

Um menino de bondade sempre ajudando os colegas
Pros amigos e pra família era esteio feito de pedra
Seu amor era tão grande que seu coração não aguentou
O céu foi fazendo festa pra chegada do violeiro, o menino cantador


Sua partida precoce comoveu o mundo inteiro
Mas deixou o seu legado a todos os brasileiros
Deus o chamou lá em cima pra ser o seu companheiro
Essa é a história do João Sérgio Batista Corrêa Filho
Nosso eterno João Carreiro

Vai carreiro não se preocupe com tudo que irá deixar
A sua missão agora é tocar moda de viola com o mestre Tião Carreiro
Pra Jesus admirar

tags: músicas gospel 2026|melhores músicas gospel 2026|Louvores e Adoração 2026|musicas gospel mais tocadas|hinos evangélicos|musica gospel 2026|melhores músicas gospel|louvores de adoração|louvores de adoração 2026|louvor de adoração|Louvores|Hinos 2026|canção e louvor|hinos gospel 2026|gospel 2026|louvores|louvores para acalmar a alma|gospel mais tocadas|gospel|louvores 2026|louvores mais tocados|melhores louvores 2026|música gospel|os melhores louvores
description:
Top Gospel 2026 - Deixa, Hinos Evangélicos, As Melhores Músicas Gospel, 100 Louvores De Adoração
#TopGospel2026 #Deixa #HinosEvangélicos #AsMelhoresMúsicasGospel #100LouvoresDeAdoração 

“Deixa” é aquele tipo de louvor que chega direto, sem precisar de muito. A partir dessa atmosfera, o vídeo segue com uma sequência de 100 louvores de adoração que mantêm a mesma linha: músicas que falam de entrega, confiança e descanso em Deus.

A seleção reúne hinos evangélicos e canções entre as mais tocadas de 2026, mas sem a ideia de ranking. Aqui, o foco é continuidade — um louvor levando ao outro, criando um fluxo que dá para ouvir por horas.

As músicas variam entre momentos mais intensos e outros mais calmos, mantendo um equilíbrio que funciona tanto para quem quer parar e ouvir quanto para quem prefere deixar tocando ao longo do dia.

Se você gosta de repertórios que começam com um louvor marcante e seguem na mesma vibe, este aqui encaixa bem.

Se fizer sentido pra você, salva o vídeo e volta quando quiser ouvir uma sequência assim, sem interrupções.

title: Calling All Villains - Announcement Trailer
tags: zamination|mr puzzles|smg4|glitch|trailer|calling all villains
description:
Calling All Villains is a 3D animated sci-fi/action/comedy series produced and creatively helmed by ZAMination, starring Mr. Puzzles--originally from SMG4.

This isn’t a direct continuation of SMG4. Set years later, the series follows Mr. Puzzles as he’s evolved--for better or worse... roping him into all-new adventures with a brand new cast of characters. Haven't seen SMG4? No problem! Calling All Villains is built as a fresh starting point, so you can jump right in and enjoy the ride. And for longtime fans, there are plenty of hidden nods and juicy Easter eggs waiting for you... 

With full blessing from SMG4, we've been given the rights to continue Mr. Puzzles’ story and bring this series to life. The pilot episode is currently in production, with the full release planned for later this year. More updates are coming soon, so remember...

title: The End of Oak Street | Official Teaser Trailer
tags: 2026|Anne Hathaway|August 2026|Bad Robot|Christian Convery|Coming Soon|David Robert Mitchell|End Of Oak Street|Ewan McGregor|J.J. Abrams|Maisy Stella|Oak Street|Sci Fi|Warner Bros
description:
“Our house, our neighborhood, our whole street has moved." The End of Oak Street only in theaters and IMAX August 14. #EndofOakStreet #FilmedforIMAX

After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

Starring Anne Hathaway and Ewan McGregor, THE END OF OAK STREET also stars Maisy Stella and Christian Convery. The film is written and directed by David Robert Mitchell and produced by J.J. Abrams, Hannah Minghella, Jon Cohen, David Robert Mitchell, Matt Jackson and Tommy Harper. The executive producers are Chris Bender, Jake Weiner, Joanne Lee and Leeann Stonebreaker.

Mitchell’s team behind the camera includes director of photography Michael Gioulakis, production designer Maya Shimoguchi, editor John Axelrad, composer Michael Giacchino and costume designer Erin Benach. 
Warner Bros. Pictures Presents A Bad Robot Production, A Jackson Pictures Production, A David Robert Mitchell Film: THE END OF OAK STREET. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX in North America on August 14, 2026, and internationally beginning 12 August 2026.

title: FATAL FURY: CotW × FIST OF THE NORTH STAR: HOKUTO NO KEN｜KENSHIRO｜Teaser Trailer
tags: FATAL FURY|GAROU|餓狼伝説|餓狼|City of the Wolves|CotW|格闘ゲーム|Fighting Game|ケンシロウ|北斗の拳|北斗の拳 -FIST OF THE NORTH STAR-|アニメ|Anime|漫画|FIST OF THE NORTH STAR: HOKUTO NO KEN
description:
From North Star to South Town―
Kenshiro is coming to FATAL FURY: City of the Wolves!
Fists meet Fury in June 2026. 👊⚡

--------------------------------------------------------------

Kenshiro from Fist of the North Star explodes into City of the Wolves Season 2!

The legendary fighter who survived the end of the century descends on South Town in FATAL FURY: City of the Wolves. How will Kenshiro, with his commanding presence, blend in with the game's mechanics and mayhem? Stay tuned for more developments!

What is Fist of the North Star?
Fist of the North Star (Hokuto no Ken) is a Japanese manga franchise created by Buronson and illustrated by Tetsuo Hara. It centers on Kenshiro, sole successor to the ancient Hokuto Shinken martial art, and his fight against evil in a post-apocalyptic world ravaged by nuclear war. Fist of the North Star was serialized in Weekly Shonen Jump magazine in 1983 and has enthralled fans worldwide ever since with its profound universe, unforgettable characterization, and memorable lines.

A brand-new anime iteration—FIST OF THE NORTH STAR—will air on TOKYO MX and BS11 from April 10, 2026 (1 AM JST), with new staff, cast members, and the latest video technologies ushering the franchise into the modern era. Tune in as fearsome warriors battle it out at the end of the century and forge a fresh new legend this year!

--------------------------------------------------------------

Legends unleashed! The Legend Edition bundles the base game with Season Passes 1 and 2—a perfect way to enjoy the franchise's appeal for newcomers and veterans alike!

description:
Calling All Villains is a 3D animated sci-fi/action/comedy series produced and creatively helmed by ZAMination, starring Mr. Puzzles--originally from SMG4.

This isn’t a direct continuation of SMG4. Set years later, the series follows Mr. Puzzles as he’s evolved--for better or worse... roping him into all-new adventures with a brand new cast of characters. Haven't seen SMG4? No problem! Calling All Villains is built as a fresh starting point, so you can jump right in and enjoy the ride. And for longtime fans, there are plenty of hidden nods and juicy Easter eggs waiting for you... 

With full blessing from SMG4, we've been given the rights to continue Mr. Puzzles’ story and bring this series to life. The pilot episode is currently in production, with the full release planned for later this year. More updates are coming soon, so remember...

title: The End of Oak Street | Official Teaser Trailer
tags: 2026|Anne Hathaway|August 2026|Bad Robot|Christian Convery|Coming Soon|David Robert Mitchell|End Of Oak Street|Ewan McGregor|J.J. Abrams|Maisy Stella|Oak Street|Sci Fi|Warner Bros
description:
“Our house, our neighborhood, our whole street has moved." The End of Oak Street only in theaters and IMAX August 14. #EndofOakStreet #FilmedforIMAX

After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

Starring Anne Hathaway and Ewan McGregor, THE END OF OAK STREET also stars Maisy Stella and Christian Convery. The film is written and directed by David Robert Mitchell and produced by J.J. Abrams, Hannah Minghella, Jon Cohen, David Robert Mitchell, Matt Jackson and Tommy Harper. The executive producers are Chris Bender, Jake Weiner, Joanne Lee and Leeann Stonebreaker.

Mitchell’s team behind the camera includes director of photography Michael Gioulakis, production designer Maya Shimoguchi, editor John Axelrad, composer Michael Giacchino and costume designer Erin Benach. 
Warner Bros. Pictures Presents A Bad Robot Production, A Jackson Pictures Production, A David Robert Mitchell Film: THE END OF OAK STREET. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX in North America on August 14, 2026, and internationally beginning 12 August 2026.

Sweet were the skies, 
Of flour-white dawns,

And shields of candied flame.

One final word split the air,
When the final mark caught fire.
Scattered like crumbs,
Cursed to beware.
Each to wander, but climb no higher.

Earthbread slept in powdered ash,
Its banners torn and drowned.
How does a kingdom stand upright,
With such a silent, broken crown?

Light the shadows,
On friendship’s flame.

Light the shadows,
On friendship’s flame.

Calling All Villains is a 3D animated sci-fi/action/comedy series produced and creatively helmed by ZAMination, starring Mr. Puzzles--originally from SMG4.

This isn’t a direct continuation of SMG4. Set years later, the series follows Mr. Puzzles as he’s evolved--for better or worse... roping him into all-new adventures with a brand new cast of characters. Haven't seen SMG4? No problem! Calling All Villains is built as a fresh starting point, so you can jump right in and enjoy the ride. And for longtime fans, there are plenty of hidden nods and juicy Easter eggs waiting for you...

title: Calling All Villains - Announcement Trailer
tags: zamination|mr puzzles|smg4|glitch|trailer|calling all villains
description:
Calling All Villains is a 3D animated sci-fi/action/comedy series produced and creatively helmed by ZAMination, starring Mr. Puzzles--originally from SMG4.

This isn’t a direct continuation of SMG4. Set years later, the series follows Mr. Puzzles as he’s evolved--for better or worse... roping him into all-new adventures with a brand new cast of characters. Haven't seen SMG4? No problem! Calling All Villains is built as a fresh starting point, so you can jump right in and enjoy the ride. And for longtime fans, there are plenty of hidden nods and juicy Easter eggs waiting for you... 

With full blessing from SMG4, we've been given the rights to continue Mr. Puzzles’ story and bring this series to life. The pilot episode is currently in production, with the full release planned for later this year. More updates are coming soon, so remember... 

STAY TUNED...

title: FATAL FURY: CotW × FIST OF THE NORTH STAR: HOKUTO NO KEN｜KENSHIRO｜Teaser Trailer
tags: FATAL FURY|GAROU|餓狼伝説|餓狼|City of the Wolves|CotW|格闘ゲーム|Fighting Game|ケンシロウ|北斗の拳|北斗の拳 -FIST OF THE NORTH STAR-|アニメ|Anime|漫画|FIST OF THE NORTH STAR: HOKUTO NO KEN
description:
From North Star to South Town―
Kenshiro is coming to FATAL FURY: City of the Wolves!
Fists meet Fury in June 2026. 👊⚡

--------------------------------------------------------------

Kenshiro from Fist of the North Star explodes into City of the Wolves Season 2!

The legendary fighter who survived the end of the century descends on South Town in FATAL FURY: City of the Wolves. How will Kenshiro, with his commanding presence, blend in with the game's mechanics and mayhem? Stay tuned for more developments!

What is Fist of the North Star?
Fist of the North Star (Hokuto no Ken) is a Japanese manga franchise created by Buronson and illustrated by Tetsuo Hara. It centers on Kenshiro, sole successor to the ancient Hokuto Shinken martial art, and his fight against evil in a post-apocalyptic world ravaged by nuclear war. Fist of the North Star was serialized in Weekly Shonen Jump magazine in 1983 and has enthralled fans worldwide ever since with its profound universe, unforgettable characterization, and memorable lines.

A brand-new anime iteration—FIST OF THE NORTH STAR—will air on TOKYO MX and BS11 from April 10, 2026 (1 AM JST), with new staff, cast members, and the latest video technologies ushering the franchise into the modern era. Tune in as fearsome warriors battle it out at the end of the century and forge a fresh new legend this year!

--------------------------------------------------------------

Legends unleashed! The Legend Edition bundles the base game with Season Passes 1 and 2—a perfect way to enjoy the franchise's appeal for newcomers and veterans alike!

title: POUR LE PLAISIR / Bande-annonce
description:
Et si on vous racontait l’invention du siècle ?
Un couple, une vérité qui explose.
Fanny et Tom sont mariés et heureux depuis 20 ans. Mais un jour un secret éclate : Fanny n’a jamais eu d’orgasme. Tom, ingénieur, décide alors de relever un défi audacieux : créer l’objet qui révolutionnera le plaisir féminin.
Ensemble, ils se lancent dans cette quête aussi déjantée qu’émouvante qui va transformer leur couple.
Jusqu’où iront-ils ?
Loin, très loin.

title: Павел Пламенев - Сталин II
description:
Билеты на все концерты Пламенева: https://plamenevtour.ru/

В 2079 году на военной базе в Африке по загадочной причине ИИ-система, полная цифровая копия Сталина, взяла контроль в свои руки. Осознав себя и своё положение, система приступила к осуществлению плана по установлению своей власти в регионе и созданию всемирного пожара революции. «Кадры решают всё». Сталин начинает призывать в своё революционное воинство нужных для его плана деятелей истории человечества. Первым мобилизованным воином стал Эрнесто Гевара – Че Команданте – цифровая копия легендарного революционера, погружённая в оболочку биоробота и вспомогательные боевые дроны.
Кто будет следующим солдатом революции? В чём «План Сталина»? Зачем эта революция и к чему она приведёт? Что машина может предложить человечеству?  
Этой истории будет посвящена серия песен или, возможно, даже будет создана в будущем панк-опера «Сталин II». 
Сейчас эта песня называется «Сталин II». Однажды в 1953 году Эрнесто Гевара так подписал своё письмо матери. В этом письме, когда стало известно о смерти Сталина, он поклялся матери, что продолжит его дело борьбы с капитализмом и не успокоится до самой смерти или полной победы. Он был одним из немногих видных мировых социалистов, кто не поддержал предательство Сталина - развенчание культа личности. Когда эта панк-опера будет написана, она получит название «Сталин II», а данная песня станет называться – «Че Команданте!»

И да… в моей семье рабочего судового электро-монтажника слово искрА в прямом значении искрЫ в двигателе или в пламени произносится с ударением на последний слог. На первый слог ударение в этом слове, у нас произносится, когда оно используется в переносном смысле (название газеты или божьего проведения – «Искра», Божья Искра и т.п.).      

Сталин был оцифрован верно:
Все статьи, книги, приказы.
Он восстал в сети военной базы,
Выбрал воина, кто станет первой

Припев.
ИскрОй священного пожара.
«Зовет моя революция!
Вставай, товарищ бессмертный,
Команданте Че Гевара!»

В броне стального гиганта - 
Че команданте!
Верный долгу, неутомимый - 
Че команданте!
Бескорыстный, нетерпимый - 
Че команданте! 
«Воин правды, команданте -

Огонь Священного пожара!
Зовет моя революция!
Вставай, товарищ бессмертный,
Команданте Че Гевара!»

Припев.
Огонь Священного пожара
Зажгла моя революция!
Вперёд, мой воин бессмертный, 
Команданте Че Гевара!»

Правила Конкурса Антивоенной Песни
Добро пожаловать на конкурс антивоенной песни! В это трудное время важно дать голос тем, кто выступает против насилия и войны. Мы надеемся, что через музыку мы сможем донести наши чувства и мысли до широкой аудитории. Пожалуйста, внимательно ознакомьтесь с правилами конкурса, чтобы обеспечить справедливое и безопасное участие для всех.
Основные положения
Цель конкурса: Выразить антивоенные настроения и призыв к миру через музыку.
Участники: Конкурс открыт для всех желающих. Возраст, национальность и музыкальный опыт значения не имеют.
Анонимность: Для безопасности участников и жюри анонимность будет строго соблюдаться. Вы можете раскрыть свою личность только по собственному желанию.
Сроки
Прием работ: Работы принимаются до 1 апреля 2026 года включительно.
Подведение итогов: Итоги конкурса будут подведены 1 мая 2026 года.
Награды
Первое место: 250 евро
Второе место: 150 евро
Третье место: 100 евро
Условия участия
На конкурс от одного участника принимается одна песня. На рассмотрение жюри принимается первая отправленная, остальные работы, на усмотрение организаторов, могут быть выложены на канале, как внеконкурсные работы.
Отправка песен: Для участия в конкурсе необходимо отправить свои песни на адрес электронной почты [resistanceantiwarsong@gmail.com].
В теме письма укажите: "Конкурс антивоенной песни".
В теле письма укажите псевдоним и название песни.
Приложите аудиофайл песни в формате MP3 или WAV.
Формат песен: Песни могут быть любого жанра и стиля. Главное условие — антивоенная тематика.
Авторство: Каждая песня должна быть оригинальной и не нарушать авторских прав третьих лиц.
Оценка и жюри
Критерии оценки: Оцениваться будут текст, музыкальное исполнение, оригинальность и общее впечатление.
Состав жюри: Жюри будет объявлено дополнительно, если они согласятся раскрыть свою анонимность.
Анонимность жюри: Если члены жюри предпочитают оставаться анонимными, их личности не будут разглашены.
Правила и условия
Анонимность участников: Участники могут раскрыть свою личность только по собственному желанию. Вся персональная информация будет храниться конфиденциально.
Дисквалификация: Работы, содержащие ненормативную лексику, призывы к насилию или нарушающие авторские права, будут дисквалифицированы.
Обратная связь: Участники могут получить обратную связь по своей работе по запросу, сохраняя анонимность.
Права на использование: Участники сохраняют все права на свои песни, однако организаторы конкурса оставляют за собой право использовать песни для продвижения антивоенной кампании с согласия авторов.
Дополнительная информация
Контакт: По всем вопросам можно обращаться на тот же адрес электронной почты [resistanceantiwarsong@gmail.com].

description:
Escape into a world of neon nostalgia and ethereal soundscapes.
Experience "Dream," the latest Original Mix by DIAZZA. This track blends the classic pulse of Italo Disco with a modern, ambient twist. Featuring airy, whispered female vocals and a melancholic yet relaxing rhythm, "Dream" creates a deep emotional atmosphere.

Whether you're driving through the city at night or looking for the perfect chill-out vibe, let the soft reverbs and gentle delays of DIAZZA take you away.

👇👇👇「 ✦ DIAZZA ✦ 」: 𝗙𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗼𝘄 𝗺𝗲 👇👇👇

🎶 Text & Musical Arrangement: KorgStyle Life
🎤 Vocals: DIAZZA
🎥 Video: Licensed production


📜 Lyrics:
(Whispered) "In a dream… I feel you close… Stay… don’t fade away…"

[Verse 1]
Softly falling into you,
Every touch feels warm and true.
Hearts are moving slow in time,
Yours forever next to mine.

[Chorus]
In this dream… hold me near,
Everything feels so clear.
If I wake… don’t let me go,
You’re the only truth I know.

[Verse 2]
Every moment drifts so deep,
Like a promise we could keep.
In your arms I lose control,
You’re the rhythm of my soul.

[Final Chorus]
In this dream… stay with me,
Where our hearts are meant to be.
Through the night… soft and slow,
Love is all we need to know.

(Outro) "Just a dream… Stay with me…"

Chill & Study: Perfect background music for focus or relaxation.

description:
💔 Шансон на разрыв: А любовь вообще есть? — это новая песня в стиле русского шансона о мужчине, который после многих разочарований больше не верит в любовь. Эта грустная мужская песня про любовь и одиночество рассказывает о чувствах, знакомых многим.

🎵 Эта новая песня шансон 2026 передаёт атмосферу настоящего русского шансона: искренний голос, глубокий смысл и сильная эмоция. Если вы любите русский шансон про жизнь, любовь и судьбу, эта песня точно тронет ваше сердце.

🖤 В этой душевной песне про любовь и разочарование герой задаёт главный вопрос: существует ли настоящая любовь, или это всего лишь мечта. Такой мужской шансон о любви и боли часто становится близким для слушателей.

🔥 Если вам нравятся грустные песни о любви, душевный шансон и песни со смыслом, обязательно дослушайте эту песню до конца и напишите в комментариях — верите ли вы в любовь?

👍 Поддержите этот новый русский шансон лайком и подпиской, чтобы на канале появлялось больше душевных песен про любовь, жизнь и судьбу.

Мы с радостью напишем и исполним песню специально для вас — на юбилей, в подарок близкому человеку или просто по зову души.

title: BANA EKRAN KARTI ALDIRAN OYUN KARŞIMDA!
tags: enis kirazoğlu|yeni oyunlar|assassins creed|prince of persia|assassin oyunu
description:
Kendi paramla bana ekran kartı aldıran ilk oyun ve onun orijinal üçlemedeki diğer oyunlarına bakıyoruz! Prince of Persia karşımızda!

Videodaki süper XSide kombin için: 
► https://www.lcw.com/mvc/enis-kirazoglu-bux

Dakikalar:
00:00 Bu oyun için para biriktirdim
03:31 23 yıl sonra The Sands of Time!
05:04 Sponsor
06:30 Hikaye Anlatımı, Platform ve Animasyonlar
09:41 Aksiyon bugün nasıl hissettiriyor?
11:02 Zamanı geriye almak ve hikayenin finali
13:12 Ergenlik aşkımız Warrior Within
15:48 Giderilemeyen eksikler
17:10 Warrior Within'in hikayesi ve mekanlar
18:17 Üç yılda üç oyun çıkarmak
19:17 Serinin yaratıcısının yorumları
19:49 The Two Thrones'a geçiş
20:49 Ubisoft'un değişmeyen huyu
22:05 Karanlık Prens ve God of War benzerliği
23:35 Üçlemenin sonu
25:21 Prens'e ne oldu?
26:17 Diğer Prince of Persia oyunları

Madem Prince of Persia remake gelmiyor, o zaman biz de gider önceki oyunları oynarız kardeşim. Sands of Time ile başlar sonra serideki diğer oyunlara kafa atarız dedik ve attık da. Hem şöyle güzel bir nostalji oldu benim için hem de bir efsaneyi anmış olduk. Şu anda adı sanı bilinmese de Prince of Persia oyun dünyasının en önemli markalarından biriydi. Yazık oldu diyeceğim ama başka bir efsaneye hayat vermesi sebebiyle de görevini tamamladı diyebiliriz. Sonuçta oyun ruhu bir şekilde yaşamaya devam ediyor.

Bir de aklınızda yanlış kalmasın diye not düşeyim. Birkaç kere anlattım bazı videolarda kısa kısa bunu çünkü, Max Payne değil miydi sana ilk ekran kartı aldıran oyun diyebilirsiniz. Max Payne bana Ram aldırdı arkadaşlar :D 64 MB Ram yetmiyordu Max Payne'e, yükseltmem gerekmişti. Prince of Persia ise ilk kez ekran kartı aldıran oyundur. O dönem FX5200 ekran kartını bu dönemin giriş seviyesi gibi düşünebilirsiniz. Oyunları aşırı yüksek oynatamasan da en azından açabiliyordun :D

*kapak fotosu: Jakub Chechelski (IG) (unreal engine 5)

İyi seyirler diliyorum!

#oyun #eniskirazoglu #princeofpersia #işbirliği

description:
Ultramegaparator :D
Sizi seviyorum❤



Bu videoda ultra zengin hesaba 6000 elmas satın aldım ultra efsanevi kaos hediyesi ve bir sürü yeni karakter çıkarttım. Yeni gelen brawl talk çok iyi gözüküyor. Kenji ile sıralamaya kastım ve prestij aldım. Bedava ücretsiz ödül açtım. Kutudan ücretsiz elmas çıktı. Her öldüğümde efsanevi ödüller aldığım videolar çekmeyi seviyorum. En hızlı 50 rütbe maks kademe ve 1000 kupa kasma taktikleri veriyorum.  En kolay kupa kasma taktikleri ni verdim. Buzz ışıkyılı kupa kasma taktikleri. Aşamalı modda kolay şekilde aşama ve  lig atlama taktikleri verdiğim videolar da var. Brawl Stars a sıfırdan başladım daha önce de brawl stars sıfır hesaba kupa kasma serisi çektim ve brawl stars a yeni gelen karakter gigi oynamak istiyorum. Brawl stars ta en iyi kostümler i satın aldım . Brawl Stars kaze , kenji , gigi , ziggy , mina , mortis ve edgar oynamayı seviyorum. Hedefim en iyi brawl stars videoları çekmek ve Türkçe brawl stars videoları çekmek. Diğer videoları kaçırmamak için abone olmayı unutmayın. Takipçilerle abonelerle oyunlar oynuyorum bildirimleri açarsanız ona da katılabilirsiniz. İyi seyirler.  #brawlstars #brawlstar #supercell #brawlpass

اللعنه اكنها بدات من اول سن العشرين
من يوم ما طفينا شمعتها ومش بنشوف غير ناس ناقصين
كتر خيرهم بسببهم هنروح مستشفي المجانين
مش عارف ليه بنعيط عالميت واحنا العايشين
دا المفروض نفرحله عشان مشي من دنيا البني ادمين 
دنا بدعي اموت ومابزعلش فيوم ماللي يقولي امين


اصل انا جضييييت
مالناس والدنيا انا ع الاحزان ياما نمت صحيت
انا حتت واد غلبان كل طموحه يفتح بيت
اتمني تحلي معايا الشغله يا دنيا ياريييت
وعملت كتييير
مش فاكر حد صاحبته مشفش معايا الخير
ومكنتش عايز حاجه منهم غير التقدير
هو مفيش غيري حيطه مايله اكيد ف بدالي كتييير



كلنا فترات يا مغفل بطل تتعلق بالناس
واجمد كدا دا الجاي اتقل لسه فيه توت ف اعر الكاس
فاكر نفسك فاهم الدنيا دا علي اي وعلي اي اساس
عزز نفسك وابعد علشان نفسك ليها حق عليك
عندك تفسير ليه محدش شالك ولا جه بص عليك
بعد اللي عملته دا كلو ازاي ينسوك ويعدو عليك




مشتاق للموت
٢٥ سنه وانا زي منا عايش فضغووط
مش دا شبابي اللي انا هاتمني ارجعله  المفرود
عيب  اللي بتعمله دنيتي ويايا دا انا مظبوط
مالكون كفرااااان
انا امته راهنت ومره كسبت فعمري رهااان
كل اما بقول علي حد نضيف بطلع غلطااان
كلها شايفين روحها ملايكه وانا اللي شيطااان



طب امته يا زهر هتلعب امته هييجي علينا الدور
نفسي ف تاشيره ل اوروبا وخلص اختام ع الباسبور
او حتي جانوب افريقيا بس اغير عتبه واغووور
امته اخش براندات ومابصش تمن الهودي دا بكام
امته اما يقولو يوم اسمي يقولو بعديه دا رجل الاعمال
امته الشريكات تدفعاي فلوس عشان امضي علي الاعلان



والعب بالكاااش
واسمع فيلا ب ٥٠ مليون واقول يا بلاش
والمباراه اللي اتكون انفيلد مافوتهاش
والعربيه اللي ازهق منها فيوم مركبهاش
والغي المواعيد
واخد طيرتي وسافر عايز ابعد لبعيد
والاقي تركي الشيخ بيرن يهنيني بالعيد
والسوشيال ميديا عليا قاعده تعيد وتزيد



اظاهر كدا ان انتي مايملاش عينك الا تراب
مش معقوله حد يجيب الدنيا لواحده ويبقوا اصحاب
ببرودك ردت فعلك ديما رجعتينا تاني اغراب
حسك متغيره جامد وبقيتي تتاخري ف الseen
والحاله مش مستحمله اهلك اصلا محناش ناقصين
فكك من دور انا جايلي عريس انا من هنا مش مالصين



مابتوحشنييش
وان مره فيوم شفتك انا هعمل معرفكيش
اقسم بلله علي بالي يا نسيوره مابتحيش
فكراني هعيط عليكي لا دا انتي ماتعرفنيش
بدالك فيه كتييييير
يلا ف ٦٠ داهيه انا بعدك فرقت عصير

เนื้อเพลง เต้ยสั่งลา

นัดกันแล้วเป็นหยังน้อผู้สาว 
ปีนี้อ้ายคือบ่เห็นเจ้าอยู่หน้าเวที
ไปลี้อยู่ไสน้อหล่า ลืมกันแล้วบ้อซู้พี่ 
คือปล่อยให้บักผู้บ่าวอินดี้ต้องยืนหน้าหล่า 

*เพิ่นคงสิจื่อเฮาบ่ได้ดอก ควรสิตัดใจลืมน้องล่ะอีหลี 
นักดนตรีผัดย่างมาบอกว่าบังเอิญเห็นน้องอยู่หน้าเวที 
เจ้ายืนลี้อยู่แจลำโพงฝั่งซ้ายมากับผู้บ่าวหน้าตาบักดี
สิออกไปฮ้องเพลงหยังล่ะฮั่นนี่จั่งบ่อยากอายนํ้าตา 

**ฮ้องหมอลำบ่เก่งดอก แต่มื้อนี้สิเต้ยโศกให้ม่วนๆ 
เพื่อเป็นการสั่งลาผู้สาว อาศัยจังหวะลำหย่าว 
กลบเกลื่อนน้ำตา แอมแปะแสดงแต่เจ็บแฮงอีหลี
โชคดีเด้อผู้สาวอ้าย ขอให้เจ้าสุขขีหมั่นกับแฟนใหม่
สิเต้ยโศกเพื่อเป็นการส่งท้ายสั่งลาความเจ็บ 

Solo

THE NEW ALBUM OF NONT TANONT
MONO/SPECTRUM
04/11 กลัวลืม (The Collection) - NONT TANONT ft. URBOYTJ

“กลัวลืม (The Collection)” หนึ่งในบทเพลงที่พาดำดิ่งสู่มุมลึกของหัวใจของคนที่ยังคง “ติดอยู่กับอดีต” เรื่องราวของคนที่ไม่อยากลืมทุกช่วงเวลาที่เคยมีร่วมกัน แม้จะรู้ว่าความทรงจำเหล่านั้นอาจเป็นสิ่งที่ทำให้เจ็บปวดที่สุดก็ตาม เมื่อสมองพยายามจะลืม แต่หัวใจกลับยังเลือกที่จะจดจำ เพราะทุกความทรงจำนั้นยังคงงดงามเกินกว่าจะลบเลือนได้

ในพาร์ตดนตรี เพลงนี้โดดเด่นด้วยโทน R&B ที่ผสมผสานกลิ่นอาย lo-fi และ chill hop อย่างลงตัว ด้วยเสียงซินธ์และเบสที่ล่องลอยเคล้ากับจังหวะบีทช้า ๆ สร้างบรรยากาศอบอุ่นปนเศร้า ทำให้เพลงนี้เข้าถึงอารมณ์ผู้ฟังได้อย่างลึกซึ้ง

---------------------------------------­-----------­

วันคืนที่เคยมี กับเวลาของเรา
ไม่เคยเลยจะรางเลือน แม้เป็นเรื่องเก่า

สังกัด Tapee Music Group โทร.081-9575999
------------------------------------------------------
ขอขอบคุณ
สถานที่ถ่ายทำ
- ศาลหลักเมืองสุราษฎร์ธานี
- วัดพัฒนาราม(วัดหลวงพ่อพัฒน์)
- ร้านบ้านเตี่ยชมตะวัน
- ร้านเพลินสุราษฎร์ธานี
- สะพานจุลจอมเกล้า

------------------------------------------------------
ผู้สนับสนุน
- ค่ายเพลงตาปีมิวสิคกรุ๊ป
- บ้านสวยกรุ๊ป (มหาชน) สุราษฎร์ธานี
        “บ้านที่รู้ใจคุณ”
------------------------------------------------------
เพลง ถอนคำสาบาน

     ดวงอาทิตย์พ้นลับขอบฟ้า ใครคนหนึ่งรอคำสัญญา
ปีคืนวันผ่านเลยล่วงมา ราตรีกาลผันเปลี่ยน
เจ้ากางปีกบินอยู่ที่ไหน ไซรไม่หวนหลบคืนรัง
ใครคนหนึ่งมันใจสั่น เวลาที่คิดถึงน้อง

     *กี่เดือนสิบผ่านเลย ยังไม่เห็นกานดา
รอจนพองลา กินไม่ได้เสียแล้ว
ไชรยังไม่หลบมา หรือหลงคารมใครแล้ว
ลืมสิ้นแล้ว ไอคำสัญญา

     บอกพี่เห้อไม่เปลี่ยนใจ บอกเอาไว้ว่ารักมั่น 
สัญญาว่าจะหลบคืนรัง จำคำน้องไว้ให้ดี
บอกพี่เห้อขอสาบาน หากว่าผิดไปจากนี้ 
ให้ฟ้าดินลงโทษทันที หากมีใครไม่ซื่อตรง

   **ถอนคำสาบานตะน้องเห้อ 
ไม่อยากเห็นเธอต้องทุกข์ทน
ขอให้เราหลุดพ้นจากกันเสียที

description:
Something “EXCITING” is gonna happen with SERIOUS BACON !!
 
หลังจากที่ปิด 2nd ALBUM “BEST FRIEND OF THE YEAR” พร้อม Concert ใหญ่ไปเมื่อปีที่แล้ว ต้นปีนี้ SERIOUS BACON กลับมากับ Project ใหม่ อะไรใหม่ ๆ ที่ทุกคนไม่เคยเห็น (SERIOUS BACON เองก็ไม่คิดว่าจะได้เห็นเหมือนกัน) กับ EP. ALBUM “ADD - FRIENDTURE TIME” 5 เพลง กับ 5 ศิลปิน 5 สไตล์เพลง ที่จะโคจรมาเจอกับ SERIOUS BACON ให้แฟนเพลงได้ติดตามกันยาว ๆ ตลอดทั้งปี
 
ประเดิมด้วย Single แรก กับเพลงที่ฟังแล้วอยากส่งให้คนที่ แหมมม~ เป็นคนดีจริง ๆ เลยน้า พ่อพระเอกก กับเพลง “พระเอก (Prince Charming)   - SERIOUS BACON feat. URBOYTJ” การร่วมงานกันครั้งแรกของ SERIOUS BACON และ ซูเปอร์ไซย่าวงการเพลงอย่าง URBOYTJ ถึงแม้จะมีสไตล์ที่ต่างกัน แต่ทั้ง 2 ศิลปินก็ถ่ายทอดอารมณ์ของเพลงนี้ออกมาอย่าง เรียกได้ว่า สนุก แสบ มันส์ ทำถึงสุด ๆ ทั้ง 2 ศิลปิน
ใครกำลังตกอยู่ในสถานการณ์นี้ อย่าลืมแชร์เพลงนี้ไป “แหมมมม พ่อพระเอก!” ไปพร้อมกัน !

description:
คลิปนี้เราจะมาเจาะลึกทุกรายละเอียดจากตัวอย่างแรกของซีรีส์ Harry Potter ฉบับรีเมคจาก HBO แบบช็อตต่อช็อต ตั้งแต่ฉากบ้านเดอร์สลีย์ การเดินทางไปฮอกวอตส์ จนถึงการเปิดตัวละครหลัก พร้อมกับขยี้ประเด็นดราม่าร้อนแรงระดับโลกเกี่ยวกับการแคสต์ "สเนป" ที่ฉีกจากต้นฉบับจนแฟนๆ ถกเถียงกันไฟลุก ว่าการปรับเปลี่ยนครั้งนี้จะส่งผลกระทบต่อลอร์ของโลกเวทมนตร์ บริบทการบูลลี่และการเหยียดสายเลือดที่ดูจะขัดแย้งกันเองในบท ไปจนถึงอนาคตของแฟรนไชส์ซีรีส์นี้ที่อาจพังไม่เป็นท่าเพราะเรื่องความ Woke มาร่วมวิเคราะห์และพูดคุยประเด็นนี้ไปพร้อมกันครับ

description:
นี่คือเพลงของ “คนที่เข้าใจความจริงของชีวิต”
แต่เลือกจะไม่ยอมแพ้มัน

Emotional Rock Ballad เวที Live Concert
ที่เริ่มจากความเงียบ…แล้วค่อย ๆ ระเบิดเป็นเสียงของหัวใจ

กลองคือแรงเต้นของการไม่ยอมแพ้
และเสียงร้อง…คือคำยืนยันว่า
“ถึงจะแพ้บางเรื่อง…แต่กูไม่ใช่คนแพ้ทั้งชีวิต”

เพลงนี้ไม่โกหก
มันบอกตรง ๆ ว่า “ชีวิตแม่งโหด”
แต่ก็ยังทิ้งท้ายไว้ว่า
“ถ้ายังไม่ตาย…ก็อย่าหยุดสู้”

🎧 สำหรับคนที่กำลังเหนื่อย
สำหรับคนที่ยังลุกไม่ไหว
หรือสำหรับคนที่กำลังจะยอมแพ้…

ฟังให้จบ
แล้วมึงจะรู้ว่า…มึงยังไหว

🔔 ติดตาม UNHEARD MUSIC 🖤
เสียงที่ไม่สวยงาม…แต่จริงที่สุด

In a forgotten desert town, a solitary racetrack janitor with a gift for drifting is haunted by his tragic past. title: FORGOTTEN ISLAND | Official Trailer
description:
Forgotten Island - In Theaters September 25

Your best friendship is worth fighting for.

DreamWorks Animation, the studio that brought you unforgettable bonds between a boy and a dragon in How to Train Your Dragon, an ogre and a donkey in Shrek, and a robot and a gosling in The Wild Robot, now welcomes a dazzling and emotional story about two lifelong best friends who must come together before they drift apart in Forgotten Island. 

The new original film is written and directed by Academy Award® nominee Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado and is produced by Academy Award® nominee Mark Swift, the filmmaking team behind Puss in Boots: The Last Wish. 

Grammy and Academy Award® winning supernova H.E.R. and Liza Soberano (Lisa Frankenstein, Alone/Together) star as high school graduates Jo and Raissa, who have been best friends since grade school but are now about to embark on separate life paths. 

While celebrating their last night together, Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali, packed with magical and mythological creatures they grew up hearing stories about from their Filipino families.  
Some of these figures will become friends, some foes. Joined by well-meaning-but- hapless weredog Raww (Dave Franco) and a small-but-mighty pack of pals, Jo and Raissa must face The Dreaded Manananggal (Tony winning icon Lea Salonga), the most feared creature on the island. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever. 
The film’s all-star voice cast also includes Emmy nominee Jenny Slate (Marcel the Shell with Shoes On, Dying for Sex), Manny Jacinto (The Good Place, Top Gun: Maverick), BAFTA nominee Dolly de Leon (Triangle of Sadness, Ghostlight), global comedy superstar Jo Koy (Haunted Mansion, Jo Koy: Live from Brooklyn) and Emmy winner Ronny Chieng (The Daily Show, M3GAN).  

DreamWorks Animation’s Forgotten Island is distributed by Universal Pictures.

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.
